title: Transform your Dance Skills in Lessons with Arthur Murray Alexandria's Professional Guidance (Up To 79% Off)

pricing_options.label: Two Private Dance Lessons, One Group Dance Lesson, and One Practice Session

highlights_html: Trained instructors guide students preparing for weddings or improving their skills through private lessons at a professional studio
highlights_text: Trained instructors guide students preparing for weddings or improving their skills through private lessons at a professional studio
about_deal_html:
Ever dreamt of dancing the night away with confidence and flair? Picture this: gliding across the dance floor, mastering the moves that make every beat feel like second nature. With Arthur Murray's dance lessons, you can transform that dream into reality. Whether you're looking to learn a stately waltz, spice things up with a rumba, or add some swing to your step, these lessons offer a perfect blend of instruction, fun, and fitness.

What We Offer

Two Private Dance Lessons, One Group Dance Lesson, and One Practice Session

Students can bring a partner to private or group lessons, or fly solo and dance with the instructor. Private lessons imbue bodies with a greater understanding of the dance style of choice, covering crucial topics such as timing, posture, and balance.

Participants may stick to a stately waltz, spice up life with a rumba, or feel vibrant and playful with a few swing steps in a personal repertoire. Group lessons focus the mind's eye and the feet's feelers on leading and following a variety of partners, and practice parties emulate the atmosphere of a nightclub, rife with dancers of all skill levels and hair gels of all stiffness gradients.

Things to Know

  • Click here to view the calendar for upcoming classes
  • No dance partner is required. Click here to see what it's like to take a dance class by yourself.

Why You Should Grab This Offer

Arthur Murray Dance Studios has been synonymous with high-quality dance instruction for over a century. Since 1912, Arthur Murray has revolutionized the way people learn to dance, offering lessons that are not just educational but also incredibly fun and confidence-boosting. With their extensive experience and commitment to excellence, Arthur Murray's instructors are experts in transforming novices into confident dancers. Whether you're preparing for a special event or simply want to enjoy the thrill of dancing, this offer provides the perfect opportunity.

Arthur Murray’s dedication to providing a welcoming and enjoyable environment shines through in their approach. With a 4.8-star rating on Groupon, they have consistently delivered satisfaction and delight to their clients. Whether it's the thrill of learning a new skill, the joy of dancing with others, or the satisfaction of mastering a dance routine, this package is designed to offer an enriching experience that you'll cherish.

FAQ

  1. Can I learn to dance? > Dancing becomes easy and fun the moment you begin dance lessons with one of the friendly Arthur Murray experts. Hundreds of thousands have already learned to dance the Arthur Murray way. You do not need to bring a partner to learn and enjoy dancing in any of our studios.
  2. Is dancing easy to learn? > The school is famous for making learning to dance fun and easy. They teach four simple basic movements from which new combinations are derived.
  3. How qualified will my instructor be? > All of Arthur Murray Dance Studio's dance experts must complete a very arduous training regimen. They are experienced on the dance floor and are knowledgeable in techniques that will help you master today’s popular dances. Rest assured that the instructors selected for you are the best in the business.

Find more frequently asked questions here.

fine_print: Merchant's standard cancellation policy applies (any fees not to exceed Groupon price).

review_quotes.text: Grea place, great energy and great teachers! Clara was our instructor and she is phenomenal! Will definitely be coming back. 10/10 recommended
review_quotes.author: Paxaj

review_quotes.text: Great instructors. Good experience. Does result in marketing to sell dance packages.
review_quotes.author: MARJORIE

review_quotes.text: I don't usually write reviews, but the folks at Arthur Murray deserve 5 stars! Our teacher, Avery, was so wonderful, really getting to know us and help us craft an easy yet beautiful wedding first dance. This groupon is a very good deal, I feel like we got a lot of value! They will try to upsell you a package of more dance lessons (obviously) but aren't pushy and regardless of what you sign up for, the staff is friendly, attentive and personable!
review_quotes.author: Amy

review_quotes.text: Friendly, knowledgeable instructors and coordinator. Not pushy but informative.
review_quotes.author: Fran
